hooks.command: { command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 && uv run "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/go_format_vet.py"; } || { python3 --version >/dev/null 2>&1 && python3 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/go_format_vet.py"; } || { command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1 && python "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/go_format_vet.py"; } || echo '{"decision":"allow","reason":"no python runner found; skipping go format/vet hook"}'
